summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Script Genius V2 Enhanced Script Writing System with Profiles - All major features working correctly

minor_issues.issue: Requires transcripts to generate hooks (expected behavior)
minor_issues.impact: User must add videos before generating hooks

Projects filtered by profile_id with complete data isolation
Brand Voice DNA form with all fields (tone, personality, favorite_words, forbidden_words, hook_templates, cta_templates)
Hook selection supports multiple hooks for A/B testing
Analytics page shows profile-specific learning data
Caption generation returns multiple variations (3 captions + hashtags)
Chat interface for AI script editing
Profile selector UI with both profiles visible
Navigation between Dashboard, Projects, Brands, Analytics pages
Project Editor UI with video input, language selector, tabs (Hooks, Body, CTA, Final)
Dashboard with stats cards and Learning Mode indicator

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major UI components and V2 workflows functional
